raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Scammers think seniors are easy prey.",
    "Americans over 60 lost over $4.8 billion to scams in 2024.",
    "This represents a 43% increase from the previous year.",
    "The average loss per senior victim was $83,000.",
    "Common elder fraud schemes include tech support scams, romance scams, grandparent scams, government impersonation scams, sweepstakes/charity/lottery scams, and home repair scams.",
    "Criminals pose as technology support representatives to gain remote access to victims' devices.",
    "Romance scammers capitalize on elderly victims' desire to find companions.",
    "Grandparent scammers pose as relatives claiming to be in financial distress.",
    "Government impersonators threaten to arrest victims unless they provide funds.",
    "Many individuals who are duped do not report the incident."
  ]
}
```
